message:
chore(beads): sync tracker state for resolved compiler and wasm browser work

Update the checked-in Beads state to reflect issue status changes that have
already been completed elsewhere in the worktree and coordination threads.

This tracker-only commit captures two concrete state transitions:

- close `asupersync-13mns` as stale because the original typed-symbol test
  inference blocker is no longer the active cargo frontier; the recorded
  close reason now notes that the tree had moved on to
  `src/net/worker_channel.rs` missing-docs warnings instead
- close `asupersync-4l9iw.2` to record that the maintained Rust-authored
  browser consumer fixture, validator script, and contract coverage were
  completed for the WASM/Rust API lane

The `.migration-hint-ts` timestamp is also advanced so the checked-in Beads
metadata stays in sync with the updated JSONL state export.

No code changes are included here; this commit is only the issue-tracker
projection of work that was already finished in the repository.
